_comment: Worked examples of the 'treatment-process' billing shapes: per_session (recurring, capped) and per_day (priced by bed category). Contrast with the one_time surgical shape in ophthalmology.json.

additional_information.recurrence_rule: Chronic dialysis: max 3 sessions/week per pre-auth; extra dialysis needs a separate pre-auth
additional_information.doc_cadence: Chronic patients submit investigations once, then repeat monthly; Serum Iron/ferritin/TIBC/TSAT/SGOT/SGPT/viral markers/calcium/phosphate quarterly
additional_information.special_empanelment: Dialysis machines, water treatment plant, Hep-B isolation area, dialysis reprocessing area

source_refs.rates_inr: HBP-2022.pdf master rows MG072A (1500 base; tier 1500/1800/1800)
source_refs.base_rate_inr / billing_unit: Haemodialysis, Renal failure, AV Fistula _PPD.CPD.pdf — package table (MG072A 1500/-) + docs-table column 'Haemodialysis – per session'
source_refs.pricing.quantity_cap: same STG §1.4 pre-auth header ('max 3 times/week, extra dialysis needs separate pre-auth') + §2.2.1 PPD checklist ('Maximum 3 dialysis sessions per week in a single pre-authorisation?')
source_refs.additional_information.doc_cadence: same STG §1.4 mandatory-documents table (chronic: once then monthly; quarterly panel)
source_refs.additional_information.is_addon_to: same STG — AKI/Renal failure row note 'Dialysis, if required, will be add on package'

additional_information.total_formula: per-day bed rate x number of days in that bed category
additional_information.dialysis_addon: If dialysis is required during the admission it is billed as add-on package MG072A
additional_information.vintage_note: These bed rates are the package-specific rates printed in the June-2020 STG (HBP 1.0/2.0). HBP 2022 generic per-day medical bed rates differ (ward 2100 / hdu 3300 / icu 8500 / icu-vent 9000) — confirm the correct rate against the clean HBP 2022 master Excel per package.

source_refs.pricing.bed_rates_inr: Haemodialysis, Renal failure, AV Fistula _PPD.CPD.pdf — package table MG045A (General Ward 1800 / HDU 2700 / ICU no-vent 3600 / ICU vent 4500)
source_refs.billing_unit / quantity_basis: same STG — per-day medical management stratified by bed category
source_refs.additional_information.alos: same STG — ALOS section ('AKI/Renal failure: 7-14 days')
